skillSlots.name: Scythe of Oblivion
skillSlots.description: Attacks 3 enemies with lowest HP twice, each dealing 80% ATK as P.DMG with 60% probability to inflict [Rend].

skillSlots.name: Reaping Moment
skillSlots.description: Attacks the enemy with lowest HP 3 times, each dealing 140% ATK as P.DMG with 40% probability to inflict [Rend].

effects.name: Death Announcement
effects.description: When attacking targets with [Rend], deals additional P.DMG equal to 8% of target's lost HP per hit (max 100% ATK per hit).

effects.name: Death Announcement
effects.description: When attacking enemies with [Rend], gains 30% additional Crit Rate.

effects.name: Death Announcement
effects.description: Gains 1 stack of [Epitaph] at the start of per turn; gains 1 additional stack of [Epitaph] when any enemy dies.

effects.name: Death Announcement
effects.description: When [Epitaph] reaches 9 stacks, immediately casts [Reaping Moment] once (triggers max once per battle).

effects.name: Genesis I
effects.description: Attacks have 100% probability to inflict 1 stack of [Judgment] on target; when enemy [Judgment] reaches 9 stacks, immediately casts Ultimate on them then removes all [Judgment]. [Judgment]: Each stack reduces DEF and Crit RES by 2% (max 9 stacks), undispellable, lasts 2 turns, refreshing duration on reapplication.

effects.name: Genesis II
effects.description: When Ultimate kills an enemy, resets all skill Cooldowns and recovers 200% ATK as HP.

effects.name: Genesis III
effects.description: After casting Ultimate Skill, if target's HP is below 40%, deal Physical DMG equal to 210% ATK +14% of target's missing HP to all enemies (capped at 3× caster's ATK)

effects.name: Genesis IV
effects.description: When [Reaping Moment] fails to kill, inflicts 3 stacks of [Judgment] on target.

effects.name: Genesis V
effects.description: When triggering [Genesis I] effect, ignores Control Status; when [Reaping Moment] attacks an enemy with 9 stacks of [Judgment], triggers Reap if target's HP is below 100%, ignoring DEF, Splitting, Shields, Spirit Armor, and Invincible (max 2000% ATK).
